🤖 THE BOT REPORT

Today's "sharp money" before we cleaned it:
• 349 wallets scanned
• 366 market makers stripped
• 75 arb bots removed
→ 375 fake "sharps" filtered out

When someone says "sharps are on X," ask: which ones? Most of it is bots.

🗺️ SMART MONEY MAP — 2026-06-18

266 wallets tracked:
1. South Africa @ Czechia: $735,558 (11, Czechia)
2. Qatar @ Canada: $250,420 (4, Canada)
3. Korea Republic @ Mexico: $191,247 (7, Mexico)

Concentration = conviction.

🔍 SHARP SPOTLIGHT: BreakTheBank

A wallet we've tracked all season.
• Polymarket SOC P&L: $4,959,724
• ROI: 13.2% over $31.9M traded
• Leaderboard rank: #8 of thousands
• Avg bet: $128,239

Today they're in on 1 game. This is who we watch so you don't have to.

🧠 DATA STUDY

The public and the money agree only 86% of the time on Polymarket.

Sample: 56 games on today's slate.

We don't guess. We've tracked this all season. Thread on what it means 👇
